intended_observation: Architect raises Phase 6a SKU-confirmation gate before invoking cost-estimate-subagent.
Architect runs per-finding askQuestions, never batched with multiSelect.
Design Phase 0 raises tool-choice gate; Drawio is the recommended default.
Governance Phase 2.7 panel has exactly 2 questions (RG tag keys, allowed locations).
Architect raises Phase 9a budget gate when monthly_total > budget_cap.
